name: American School Bus Co
officers: John Benish Jr. (President, Cook-Illinois Corporation parent)
registry_source: Illinois Secretary of State (search not completed - portal returned 403)
notes: American School Bus Company - Frankfort is a subsidiary of Cook-Illinois Corporation (largest family-owned school bus contractor in US), serving SW Chicago suburbs since 1965; formerly known as Warning Charter Services, Inc. Direct SAFER keyword search returned no carrier registered as 'AMERICAN SCHOOL BUS CO' at the 10101 W Laraway Rd, Frankfort address. Related USDOT 540653 (LIBERTY SCHOOL BUS COMPANY INC, dba 'AMERICAN SCHOOL BUS', physical 10000 W 167th St Orland Park IL; 201 power units, 170 drivers, intrastate passenger, ACTIVE, no safety rating) is a sister Cook-Illinois subsidiary but corresponds to the Orland Park location, not Frankfort. The Frankfort operation may share carrier authority with the Cook-Illinois parent or be registered under 'Warning Charter Service Inc' (legacy name) - searches for that name in SAFER returned no records. Confidence low for a direct Frankfort USDOT match; entity clearly operating per Yelp/Yellow Pages June 2025 listings.

name: Lizak Bus Svc Inc
registry_source: Massachusetts Secretary of the Commonwealth - Corporations Division (per third-party aggregators; not directly retrieved)
notes: Strong name+address+state match to SAFER record. Family-owned and operated since 1939 (founder generation); current MA corporate entity Lizak Bus Service, Inc. incorporated 10/17/1978 per third-party business directories (D&B/BizStanding). Safety rating Satisfactory dated 11/06/2025 from compliance review. 135,000 miles reported for 2024; 30 inspections / 0 OOS in past 24 months; 0 crashes. MA entity registration number reported as 2339737 per directory sources (not directly verified on sec.state.ma.us).

name: B R Williams Inc
inc_date: unknown (business founded 1935; current NJ corporate entity registration date not retrieved - NJ portal not directly accessible via WebFetch)
registry_source: NJ Division of Revenue & Enterprise Services - Business Records Service (not directly retrieved; portal access blocked)
notes: Strong match by legal name + NJ + bus carrier type. Note SAFER physical address is Woodstown, NJ (the input lists Penns Grove HQ - both are in Salem County, ~7 miles apart; company website confirms HQ at 127 Stockington Rd, Woodstown, serving Salem/Gloucester/Cumberland Counties). Business founded 1935 by Benjamin Riley Williams; acquired by son in 1975; current CEO Chloe Williams Robbins since 2015. Safety rating dated 10/14/2011 (Satisfactory). NJ School Bus Contractors Association member.

name: Raphael Irvin Inc
fmcsa_address: 550 Old Stage Road, East Brunswick, NJ 08816
registry_source: NJ Division of Revenue & Enterprise Services (incorporation date per third-party aggregator citing state record; portal not directly accessed)
notes: Input name 'Raphael Irvin Inc' is an inversion of legal name 'IRVIN RAPHAEL INC' - confirmed as same entity by exact address match (550 Old Stage Rd, East Brunswick NJ 08816). Family-owned student transportation company; business established 1928 per company history, current NJ corporate entity incorporated 7/31/1957. Safety rating Satisfactory dated 02/07/2013 from compliance review. 1,505,315 miles reported in 2024. NJ School Bus Contractors Association member. Also operates a satellite location in Mercerville, NJ.

name: GST Transport
carrier_operation: Interstate (authorized; SAFER shows property classification but carrier operates school bus / passenger transportation per website and NJSBCA membership)
inc_date: unknown (business roots to 1969 as International Harvester dealership; school bus operations began 1997 when Jonathan Brunt joined; current NJ corporate entity registration date not retrieved)
officers: Jonathan Brunt (operator, joined 1997 - launched school bus side)
registry_source: NJ Division of Revenue & Enterprise Services (not directly retrieved; portal access blocked)
notes: Input row lists HQ as Freehold, NJ (98 Crow Hill Rd) but the SAFER record for GST TRANSPORT CORP (USDOT 965318) shows physical address in Southampton, NJ. Company operates multiple NJ locations (Southampton headquarters, Pemberton, Robbinsville, Freehold, New Egypt) per company website and Community News article - so Freehold is a satellite of the same company. Confidence medium because the carrier-classification field shows 'Property' in SAFER (potential legacy mis-classification - company actively operates as school bus carrier per website, NJSBCA membership, and Pemberton MVC commercial bus inspections). A second 'GST TRANSPORT INC' (USDOT 3010316) exists in Houston TX with only 4 power units - clearly a different unrelated entity. Founded 1969 (parent operation); school bus arm launched 1997. Safety rating Satisfactory dated 03/14/2012.
